steps.t: The vale of Tumladen is in the northern reaches of Upper Lebennin. You have defeated many Haradrim in Upper Lebennin and should now find the vale of T…
Many refugees from elsewhere in Gondor can be found throughout the vale of Tumladen.
Angbor has come to the entrance to the vale of Tumladen. You have learned that folk have been evacuated from Minas Tirith, and the war is about to be …
Angbor wants you to travel east of Tumladen to the Crossings of Erui, and to defeat the Haradrim camped there.
Angbor keeps watch on a hill just to the west of the Crossings of Erui.
